$schema.description: The JSON schema for this document.

members.description: The list of members on this webring

url.description:
The url for your website. HTTP and Gopher protocols accepted.
**Note**: The host part will be used for matching on the server, but the full URL will be used for redirecting to your webiste.

title.description: The title that will be displayed for your webiste on the webrign list.

github.description: Your github username. Will be used to contact people in case of major changes to the webring.
